use_cases: Primary CTA for scheduling sales or demo calls on landing pages
Direct contact button for consultation booking widgets
Quick-call action in SaaS product interfaces
Lead capture button for service-based businesses
Conversion trigger for appointment scheduling overlays
ai_summary: An animated call-to-action button with a gradient blue background and phone icon. Features smooth icon morph animation on hover where the phone slides up and a duplicate appears below, plus subtle text shift and shadow effects. Includes click feedback with scale transform and focus states for accessibility. Designed as a high-conversion booking button for SaaS, fintech, and service platforms.
